\tzpentry{ID4237}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4237 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \Delta\phi\!\left(\frac{16}{15}\right) &amp;= \frac{\pi}{15} \approx 12^\circ, \\ \Delta\phi\!\left(\frac{10}{9}\right) &amp;= \frac{\pi}{9} \approx 20^\circ...",theoretical_physics,"sured in radians. For the ratios of interest, \begin{align} \Delta\phi\!\left(\frac{16}{15}\right) &amp;= \frac{\pi}{15} \approx 12^\circ, \\ \Delta\phi\!\left(\frac{10}{9}\right) &amp;= \frac{\pi}{9} \approx 20^\circ, \\ \Delta\phi(\chi) &amp;= \frac{5\pi}{27} \approx 33.34^\circ. \end{align}
